warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
Warm Up
10 Scap Push Ups
10 scap Pull ups
10 x Inch Worms
10 I-Y-T-W
Wrist Mobilisation

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
3 Rounds for Time
2 mins On - 1 Min off
40 Double Unders
Max T2B in time remaining

gymnastics:
Double Under Progression 00:00-10:00
Even Min Singles - focus on jumping higher
Odd Mins Penguin Clap Drill
Double Under attempts - 10:00-15:00
Double - single - single - single - Double
for the DU Experts - go for max sets every 2-3 mins
T2B Bar Progression
1-2 mins False Grip on bar - focus on Knuckles Up 17:00
EMOM x 3 19:00
10 x Beat Swing
EMOM x 3 22:00
Jump Into Hollow/Arch x 10
EMOM x 3 25:00
Bigger Beat Swing - Push Down on Bar
- Put Ball between feet - Reach Long in the Arch - Dont bend the knees
EMOM x 3 28:00
Knees to Chest - Aggressive & Pop - pause
EMOM x 6 31:00-37:00
Beat Swing with Straight legs - to target
Aim for height without losing tension.

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today heavily taxes shoulders, core, and grip via gymnastics. Target pressing/pulling muscles that build mass without CNS overlap.
